attacking_style: Functions as a tactical decoy/climbing domestique rather than a finisher, launching attacks to soften opposition for team leaders. Attacks appear designed to disrupt rather than succeed.
team_tactics: Used by BMC/teams as an expendable climbing resource to launch multiple probing attacks that draw out rivals before the leader's decisive move. Sacrificial tactical role.
terrain_preference: Can operate on climbs in a domestique capacity but lacks the sustained power for grinding climbs. Ultra-endurance background suggests preference for variable pace over steady-state climbing.
vulnerability: Grinding, steady-state climbs expose his power limitations despite strong visual impression. Cannot translate ultra-endurance diesel engine into punchy climbing watts needed at WorldTour level.
key_patterns: Multiple attacks for team leader rather than personal result (2 observations)
Visual riding style (big gear mashing) more impressive than actual climbing power output (2 observations)
Tactical domestique role, not protected rider status across teams (2 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: Consistent tactical role from 2017-2020 suggests stable domestique function rather than progression to leadership
